compiled_state.title: end-session SKILL.md has stale /dso:design-wireframe reference in visual baseline comparison step
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md Step 3.5 (Visual Baseline Comparison) instructs the agent to 'ask user to run /dso:design-wireframe or create manifest retroactively' when baseline changes have no design manifests. design-wireframe is now a redirect stub (epic 28cb-a23a). Should reference /dso:preplanning (which dispatches dso:ui-designer to produce design artifacts).

Anti-pattern discovered during fix-bug anti-pattern scan for c3f2-b72c (same root cause: Multi-File State De-sync from epic 28cb-a23a conversion).
